reason: The current meta description is generic; a more specific description naming key services improves CTR in search results.
The announce bar across every page says 'Free Shipping Over $80' but this FAQ answer says 'over $100' — aligning to the $80 threshold shown site-wide.
Adding a call-to-action and mentioning page content (before & afters, FAQs) in the meta description can improve click-through rate from search.
Incorporating 'lip blush' and 'no makeup routine' into the hero subheadline reinforces the core value proposition and adds a high-intent keyword.
